text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I've finished work for the day and<n>am thinking of
taking a stroll, when...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, heeey! ♪ You wouldn't happen to<n>be about to
go on a walk, would you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. If sooo... I'd just looove it if<n>you'd join
me for a bit! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
#CurrenAfterSchool #CuteCafe #Pink
#StrawberryMilk #Probably

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
#CuteCurrenChan #SelfieBreak<n>#Date #With
#Friend

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. Do you think I'm... cute<n>today?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yay! ♪ Ehehe, I'm so happy. Keep the<n>photos
coming! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
#HeadingHome #Sunset<n>#CurrenInSepia... And
that's a wrap!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thanks for hanging out with me<n>today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! We got sooo many cute pics!<n>And having
someone take the pics for<n>you is just as fun as I
th—

text_block_list.name: College Girl
text_block_list.text:
I finally found you! Yes, you there!<n>The
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Me?

text_block_list.name: College Girl
text_block_list.text:
You're Curren Chan, right?! Oooh,<n>you're even
cuter in person than on<n>Umastagram!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, so you follow me?! Thanks so<n>much! ☆
Since we're here, do you<n>wanna take a selfie?

text_block_list.name: College Girl
text_block_list.text:
R-really?! Could I—I mean, of course<n>not! I didn't
come here to get all<n>chummy with you!

text_block_list.name: College Girl
text_block_list.text:
Listen up. I'm here to challenge you. I<n>might not be
anywhere near as<n>popular as you right now, but I
swear<n>I'll get more likes than you one day!

text_block_list.name: College Girl
text_block_list.text:
Just you wait. I'll beat you using the<n>one thing I
have that you<n>don't—womanly charm.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Having said her piece, the girl leaves<n>briskly,
stealing occasional glances at<n>Curren Chan as
she goes.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...She left.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... Womanly charm, huh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer... Am I lacking in<n>womanly charm?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Really? So what about me is<n>womanly?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Can you look at me, please? I want<n>you to answer
without averting your<n>eyes. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's no lie that Curren Chan is<n>dripping with charm,
but as for being<n>womanly, I find myself
hard-pressed<n>to find a response...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know. You can't decide, right?<n>Like I'm sooo
charming you can't<n>settle on an answer? Hehe, in
that<n>case...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I want you to help me discover my<n>most defining
womanly charm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I feel comfortable asking since it's<n>you... So, pretty
please?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! ♪ Thank you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Unable to turn Curren Chan down, I<n>find myself
recruited to the search for<n>her womanly charm...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Sooomehooow, I get the<n>feeling you're
just paying me lip<n>service. Did you really mean
what<n>you said?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
See, I knew it! Geez! In that case, I'll<n>just have to
discover my womanly<n>charm on my own and
show you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And when I do and your heart skips a<n>beat...
you'd better have some kind<n>of present for me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Having said that, Curren Chan leans<n>in to look at
me close with a<n>mischievous smile.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Is that so? But you know<n>what? I'm not
giving up!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You might not get it right now, but boy<n>will you be
surprised when you see<n>how grown up I become!
♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And when that time comes, you have<n>to tell me if I
made your heart flutter,<n>okay?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Having said that, Curren Chan gives<n>me an impish
wink.
